# Zorba Rentals

> Furnished monthly room rentals in Aylmer-Gatineau, Quebec — a 15-minute direct bus to downtown Ottawa. No credit check, only the first month's rent to move in. Wi-Fi and utilities included.

Zorba Rentals operates three furnished guest houses in Aylmer-Gatineau, QC, serving students, newcomers, contract workers and visitors to the National Capital Region. Rooms come fully furnished (queen bed, smart TV, mini-fridge, coffee maker, keypad lock, fast Wi-Fi, all utilities). Flexible month-to-month stays, no credit check required.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, locations and contact form
- [Locations](/properties): Three furnished guest houses across Aylmer-Gatineau
- [102 Chemin d'Amour](/properties/102-amour): Property details, rooms and amenities
- [58 Rue Conrad Valéra](/properties/58-conrad): Property details, rooms and amenities
- [260 Av. de la Colline](/properties/260-colline): Property details, rooms and amenities
- [All Rooms](/rooms): Browse every available room with filters and pricing
- [Apply](/apply): Online rental application form
- [Book](/book): Short-stay booking (daily or weekly)
- [About](/about): About Zorba Rentals
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about Wi-Fi, furnishings, utilities, credit, pets, transit
- [Transit](/transit): STO bus lines to downtown Ottawa, UQO, Algonquin, U of O
- [Newcomer Guide](/newcomer): Settlement links and emergency contacts

## Optional

- [Pay Rent Online](/pay): Existing-tenant payment page
- [Tenant Portal](/portal): Existing-tenant sign-in
